title: Supplementary Materials LaTeX Document: Extended Evidence Tables, Per-Domain Breakdowns, and Reviewer Objection Matrix
summary: Demo notebook for the supplementary materials compilation evaluation. Loads eval output data (section word counts, master evidence table with 18 rows across H1-H5, and 12 reviewer objections), demonstrates LaTeX formatting helpers (p-values, Z-scores, effect sizes), builds evidence table and reviewer matrix LaTeX content, computes evaluation metrics (completeness, pass rates), and visualizes results in a 4-panel figure showing section word distributions, evidence values by hypothesis, reviewer severity vs risk, and criterion pass/fail rates.
